ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "original_text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the author */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the post */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets of the post */,
  "to" TEXT /* Recipient of the post (e.g., username) */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the post */,
  "user_mentions" TEXT /* User mentions in the post */,
  "urls" TEXT /* URLs included in the post */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform of the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the post */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score of the post */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., tweet, retweet, reply) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the post was made */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the post on the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the author */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the author */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the author has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of accounts the author follows */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is verified on the platform */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the hashtag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the hashtag (e.g., political, entertainment, sports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user mention */,
  "mention_name" TEXT /* Name of the user mention */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., user, brand, page) */,
  "mention_url" TEXT /* URL of the mentioned user's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL included in the post */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the URL */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content linked by the URL */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content linked by the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_hashtags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_mentions" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "mention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_urls" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* ID of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the post */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the post */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed */,
  "engagement" INTEGER /* Number of engagements (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares on the post */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the post */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Reach of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
